content.text: Now let me check the currency service and database schema to see USDT handling:

content.content:
1→-- ============================================================================
     2→-- Database Initialization Script
     3→-- ============================================================================
     4→-- This script creates all tables, indexes, functions, and triggers for the
     5→-- crypto-billing application. All UUIDs use uuidv7() for time-ordered IDs.
     6→-- ============================================================================
     7→
     8→-- Create enum type for user role
     9→CREATE TYPE user_role AS ENUM ('ADMIN', 'USER');
    10→
    11→-- Create function to automatically update updated_at timestamp
    12→CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
    13→RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
    14→BEGIN
    15→    NEW.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
    16→    RETURN NEW;
    17→END;
    18→$$ language 'plpgsql';
    19→
    20→-- Create tenant table
    21→CREATE TABLE tenant (
    22→    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    23→    domain VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    24→    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    25→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
    26→);
    27→
    28→-- Create users table
    29→CREATE TABLE "user" (
    30→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
    31→    email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    32→    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    33→    phone VARCHAR(50),
    34→    role user_role NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USER',
    35→    is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
    36→    tenant_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    37→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    38→    CONSTRAINT fk_user_tenant FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id) REFERENCES tenant(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
    39→);
    40→
    41→-- Create index on tenant_id for faster lookups
    42→CREATE INDEX idx_user_tenant_id ON "user"(tenant_id);
    43→
    44→-- Create index on email for faster lookups (already unique, but explicit index)
    45→CREATE INDEX idx_user_email ON "user"(email);
    46→
    47→-- Create refreshToken table (using camelCase to match Kysely code)
    48→CREATE TABLE "refresh_token" (
    49→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
    50→    token VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    51→    user_id UUID NOT NULL,
    52→    expires_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
    53→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    54→    CONSTRAINT fk_refresh_token_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES "user"(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
    55→);
    56→
    57→-- Create index on userId for faster lookups
    58→CREATE INDEX idx_refresh_token_user_id ON "refresh_token"(user_id);
    59→
    60→-- Create index on token for faster lookups
    61→CREATE INDEX idx_refresh_token_token ON "refresh_token"(token);
    62→
    63→-- Create index on expiresAt for cleanup queries
    64→CREATE INDEX idx_refresh_token_expires_at ON "refresh_token"(expires_at);
    65→
    66→-- Create enum type for network
    67→CREATE TYPE network AS ENUM ('Tron', 'Ethereum', 'Solana');
    68→
    69→-- Create currency table
    70→CREATE TABLE currency (
    71→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
    72→    code VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    73→    network network NOT NULL,
    74→    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    75→    decimal_places INTEGER NOT NULL,
    76→    min_deposit_amount NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    77→    min_withdrawal_amount NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    78→    min_pool_account_balance NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    79→    threshold_pool_account_balance_to_sweep NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
    80→    optimal_pool_account_balance NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
    81→    deposit_commission VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    82→    withdrawal_commission VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    83→    contract_address VARCHAR(255),
    84→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    85→    UNIQUE (code, network)
    86→);
    87→
    88→INSERT INTO public.currency (id,code,network,name,decimal_places,contract_address,min_deposit_amount,min_withdrawal_amount,deposit_commission,withdrawal_commission, threshold_pool_account_balance_to_sweep, min_pool_account_balance, optimal_pool_account_balance) VALUES
    89→	 ('019b419b-4837-7b8c-a7bf-a81db24b54ab','USDT','Tron','USDT',6,'TG3XXyExBkPp9nzdajDZsozEu4BkaSJozs',1,5,'1%','1%+1', 500, 0, 0),
    90→	 ('019b41a0-80f8-7543-89ec-265d2d481ae3','USDT','Ethereum','USDT',6,'0x7169D38820dfd117C3FA1f22a697dBA58d90BA06',1,5,'1%','1%+1', 500, 0, 0),
    91→     ('019b41a0-80f8-7543-89ec-265d2d481ae4','USDC','Ethereum','USDC',6,'0x1c7D4B196Cb0C7B01d743Fbc6116a902379C7238',1,5,'1%','1%+1', 500, 0, 0),
    92→     ('019b41a0-80f8-7543-89ec-265d2d481ae5','ETH','Ethereum','ETH',18,NULL,0.001,0.002,'1%','1%+0.001', 0.02, 0.001, 0.01),
    93→	 ('019bd3d9-4a8f-7dc9-9e5e-c9627bf32c92','TRX','Tron','TRX',6,NULL,1,20,'1%','1%+5', 2000, 200, 1000);
    94→
    95→
    96→-- Create index on currency network for faster lookups
    97→CREATE INDEX idx_currency_network ON currency(network);
    98→
    99→-- Create index on currency code for faster lookups
   100→CREATE INDEX idx_currency_code ON currency(code);
   101→
   102→-- Create tenant_account table
   103→CREATE TABLE tenant_account (
   104→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
   105→    tenant_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
   106→    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
   107→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   108→    CONSTRAINT fk_tenant_account_tenant FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id) REFERENCES tenant(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT
   109→);
   110→
   111→-- Create index on tenant_id for faster lookups
   112→CREATE INDEX idx_tenant_account_tenant_id ON tenant_account(tenant_id);
   113→
   114→-- Create tenant_account_api_key table
   115→-- Stores API keys for tenant accounts
   116→CREATE TABLE tenant_account_api_key (
   117→    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
   118→    tenant_account_id UUID NOT NULL,
   119→    api_key VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY,
   120→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   121→    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   122→    CONSTRAINT fk_tenant_account_api_key_tenant_account FOREIGN KEY (tenant_account_id) REFERENCES tenant_account(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   123→    CONSTRAINT uk_tenant_account_api_key_name_tenant UNIQUE (name, tenant_account_id)
   124→);
   125→
   126→-- Create index on tenant_account_id for faster lookups
   127→CREATE INDEX idx_tenant_account_api_key_tenant_account_id ON tenant_account_api_key(tenant_account_id);
   128→
   129→-- Create trigger to automatically update updated_at on tenant_account_api_key table
   130→CREATE TRIGGER update_tenant_account_api_key_updated_at
   131→    BEFORE UPDATE ON tenant_account_api_key
   132→    FOR EACH ROW
   133→    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
   134→
   135→-- Network accounts are no longer stored in database
   136→-- Outstanding accounts are configured via environment variables
   137→-- Deposit pool accounts are stored directly in deposit_pool_account table
   138→
   139→-- Create balance table
   140→CREATE TABLE balance (
   141→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
   142→    currency_id UUID NOT NULL,
   143→    tenant_account_id UUID NOT NULL,
   144→    visual_balance NUMERIC NOT NULL,
   145→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   146→    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   147→    CONSTRAINT fk_balance_currency FOREIGN KEY (currency_id) REFERENCES currency(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
   148→    CONSTRAINT fk_balance_tenant_account FOREIGN KEY (tenant_account_id) REFERENCES tenant_account(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
   149→    -- Ensure unique balance per currency and tenant account combination
   150→    UNIQUE (currency_id, tenant_account_id)
   151→);
   152→
   153→-- Create index on currency_id for faster lookups
   154→CREATE INDEX idx_balance_currency_id ON balance(currency_id);
   155→
   156→-- Create index on tenant_account_id for faster lookups
   157→CREATE INDEX idx_balance_tenant_account_id ON balance(tenant_account_id);
   158→
   159→-- Create composite index on tenant_account_id and currency_id for common query patterns
   160→CREATE INDEX idx_balance_tenant_account_currency ON balance(tenant_account_id, currency_id);
   161→
   162→-- Create trigger to automatically update updated_at on balance table
   163→CREATE TRIGGER update_balance_updated_at
   164→    BEFORE UPDATE ON balance
   165→    FOR EACH ROW
   166→    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
   167→
   168→-- Create enum type for deposit status
   169→CREATE TYPE deposit_status AS ENUM ('PENDING', 'COMPLETED', 'FAILED', 'EXPIRED');
   170→
   171→-- Create deposit_pool_account table for pool-based deposit accounts
   172→-- Deposit pool accounts are now global (not tenant-specific)
   173→-- After deposit, funds are swept to the outstanding account (from environment config)
   174→-- These accounts are locked to specific currencies when used for deposits
   175→-- This table must be created before deposit table due to foreign key reference
   176→CREATE TABLE deposit_pool_account (
   177→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
   178→    address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE, -- The pool account's address (receives deposits)
   179→    private_key VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, -- The pool account's private key (for sweeping funds)
   180→    network network NOT NULL, -- The network this pool account belongs to
   181→    last_monitor_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
   182→    last_deposit_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
   183→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   184→    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
   185→);
   186→
   187→-- Create index on address for faster lookups
   188→CREATE INDEX idx_deposit_pool_account_address ON deposit_pool_account(address);
   189→
   190→-- Create index on network for faster lookups
   191→CREATE INDEX idx_deposit_pool_account_network ON deposit_pool_account(network);
   192→
   193→
   194→-- Create trigger to automatically update updated_at on deposit_pool_account table
   195→CREATE TRIGGER update_deposit_pool_account_updated_at
   196→    BEFORE UPDATE ON deposit_pool_account
   197→    FOR EACH ROW
   198→    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
   199→
   200→-- Create deposit table
   201→-- Note: deposit_pool_account must be created first due to foreign key reference
   202→CREATE TABLE deposit (
   203→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
   204→    tenant_account_id UUID NOT NULL,
   205→    currency_code VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
   206→    currency_network network NOT NULL,
   207→    amount_expected NUMERIC NOT NULL,
   208→    strict_amount_expected BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
   209→    actually_received_amount NUMERIC,
   210→    commission_amount NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
   211→    description VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
   212→    status deposit_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
   213→    payment_link VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
   214→    payment_link_expires_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
   215→    payment_link_used_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
   216→    payment_link_used_ip VARCHAR(45),
   217→    payment_link_used_user_agent VARCHAR(500),
   218→    payment_link_used_device VARCHAR(255),
   219→    payment_link_used_device_type VARCHAR(50),
   220→    -- Deposit pool account ID (required - all deposits use pool accounts)
   221→    deposit_pool_account_id UUID,
   222→    CONSTRAINT fk_deposit_deposit_pool_account FOREIGN KEY (deposit_pool_account_id) REFERENCES deposit_pool_account(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
   223→    -- Track if sweep has been completed
   224→    swept_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
   225→    sweep_transaction_hash VARCHAR(255),
   226→    amount_sweeped NUMERIC,
   227→    -- Transaction hash of the deposit transaction (when user sent funds to deposit address)
   228→    deposit_transaction_hash VARCHAR(255),
   229→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   230→    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   231→    CONSTRAINT fk_deposit_tenant_account FOREIGN KEY (tenant_account_id) REFERENCES tenant_account(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT
   232→);
   233→
   234→-- Create index on tenant_account_id for faster lookups
   235→CREATE INDEX idx_deposit_tenant_account_id ON deposit(tenant_account_id);
   236→
   237→-- Create index on status for faster lookups
   238→CREATE INDEX idx_deposit_status ON deposit(status);
   239→
   240→-- Create index on currency_code for faster lookups
   241→CREATE INDEX idx_deposit_currency_code ON deposit(currency_code);
   242→
   243→-- Create index on payment_link for faster lookups
   244→CREATE INDEX idx_deposit_payment_link ON deposit(payment_link);
   245→
   246→-- Create index on deposit_pool_account_id for faster lookups
   247→CREATE INDEX idx_deposit_deposit_pool_account_id ON deposit(deposit_pool_account_id);
   248→
   249→-- Account funds sweep table removed - funds are now swept directly to outstanding accounts
   250→-- Sweep transactions are tracked via deposit.sweep_transaction_hash
   251→
   252→
   253→-- Create composite index on status and created_at for common query patterns
   254→CREATE INDEX idx_deposit_status_created_at ON deposit(status, created_at);
   255→
   256→-- Create index on created_at for ordered queries
   257→CREATE INDEX idx_deposit_created_at ON deposit(created_at);
   258→
   259→-- Create trigger to automatically update updated_at on deposit table
   260→CREATE TRIGGER update_deposit_updated_at
   261→    BEFORE UPDATE ON deposit
   262→    FOR EACH ROW
   263→    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
   264→
   265→
   266→-- Create deposit_pool_account_locks table
   267→-- Tracks locks on pool accounts for deposits
   268→CREATE TABLE deposit_pool_account_locks (
   269→    deposit_pool_account_id UUID NOT NULL,
   270→    currency_id UUID NOT NULL,
   271→    deposit_id UUID,
   272→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   273→    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   274→    CONSTRAINT pk_deposit_pool_account_locks PRIMARY KEY (deposit_pool_account_id, currency_id),
   275→    CONSTRAINT fk_deposit_pool_account_locks_pool_account FOREIGN KEY (deposit_pool_account_id) REFERENCES deposit_pool_account(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   276→    CONSTRAINT fk_deposit_pool_account_locks_currency FOREIGN KEY (currency_id) REFERENCES currency(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT,
   277→    CONSTRAINT fk_deposit_pool_account_locks_deposit FOREIGN KEY (deposit_id) REFERENCES deposit(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
   278→);
   279→
   280→-- Create index on deposit_pool_account_id for faster lookups
   281→CREATE INDEX idx_deposit_pool_account_locks_pool_account_id ON deposit_pool_account_locks(deposit_pool_account_id);
   282→
   283→-- Create index on currency_id for faster lookups
   284→CREATE INDEX idx_deposit_pool_account_locks_currency_id ON deposit_pool_account_locks(currency_id);
   285→
   286→-- Create index on deposit_id for faster lookups
   287→CREATE INDEX idx_deposit_pool_account_locks_deposit_id ON deposit_pool_account_locks(deposit_id);
   288→
   289→-- Create trigger to automatically update updated_at on deposit_pool_account_locks table
   290→CREATE TRIGGER update_deposit_pool_account_locks_updated_at
   291→    BEFORE UPDATE ON deposit_pool_account_locks
   292→    FOR EACH ROW
   293→    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
   294→
   295→-- Create enum type for sweep record status
   296→CREATE TYPE sweep_record_status AS ENUM ('pending', 'completed', 'failed');
   297→
   298→-- Create sweep_record table
   299→-- Tracks sweep transactions from pool accounts to outstanding accounts
   300→CREATE TABLE sweep_record (
   301→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
   302→    currency_id UUID NOT NULL,
   303→    amount NUMERIC NOT NULL,
   304→    from_address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
   305→    to_address VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
   306→    transaction_hash VARCHAR(255),
   307→    status sweep_record_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   308→    error_message TEXT,
   309→    indempotency_key VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
   310→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   311→    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   312→    CONSTRAINT fk_sweep_record_currency FOREIGN KEY (currency_id) REFERENCES currency(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT
   313→);
   314→
   315→-- Create index on currency_id for faster lookups
   316→CREATE INDEX idx_sweep_record_currency_id ON sweep_record(currency_id);
   317→
   318→-- Create index on status for faster lookups
   319→CREATE INDEX idx_sweep_record_status ON sweep_record(status);
   320→
   321→-- Create index on from_address for faster lookups
   322→CREATE INDEX idx_sweep_record_from_address ON sweep_record(from_address);
   323→
   324→-- Create index on to_address for faster lookups
   325→CREATE INDEX idx_sweep_record_to_address ON sweep_record(to_address);
   326→
   327→-- Create index on transaction_hash for faster lookups
   328→CREATE INDEX idx_sweep_record_transaction_hash ON sweep_record(transaction_hash) WHERE transaction_hash IS NOT NULL;
   329→
   330→-- Create index on indempotency_key for faster lookups (already unique, but explicit index)
   331→CREATE INDEX idx_sweep_record_indempotency_key ON sweep_record(indempotency_key);
   332→
   333→-- Create composite index on created_at for common query patterns
   334→CREATE INDEX idx_sweep_record_status_created_at ON sweep_record(created_at);
   335→
   336→-- Create trigger to automatically update updated_at on sweep_record table
   337→CREATE TRIGGER update_sweep_record_updated_at
   338→    BEFORE UPDATE ON sweep_record
   339→    FOR EACH ROW
   340→    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
   341→
   342→-- Create enum type for withdrawal status
   343→CREATE TYPE withdrawal_status AS ENUM ('CREATED', 'PROCESSING', 'COMPLETED', 'CANCELLED', 'FAILED');
   344→
   345→-- Create withdrawal table
   346→CREATE TABLE withdrawal (
   347→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
   348→    external_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
   349→    status withdrawal_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'CREATED',
   350→    tenant_account_id UUID NOT NULL,
   351→    currency_code VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
   352→    address VARCHAR(255), -- Destination address for withdrawal (set when processing)
   353→    amount NUMERIC NOT NULL,
   354→    is_test BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,
   355→    custom_data JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
   356→    webhook_url VARCHAR(500),
   357→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   358→    updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
   359→    CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawal_tenant_account FOREIGN KEY (tenant_account_id) REFERENCES tenant_account(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT
   360→    -- Note: currency_code is not a foreign key because currency has a composite unique key (code, network)
   361→    -- The currency_code field stores the currency code as a string reference
   362→    -- Withdrawals are processed from outstanding accounts (configured via environment variables)
   363→);
   364→
   365→-- Create index on external_id for faster lookups (already unique, but explicit index)
   366→CREATE INDEX idx_withdrawal_external_id ON withdrawal(external_id);
   367→
   368→-- Create index on status for faster lookups
   369→CREATE INDEX idx_withdrawal_status ON withdrawal(status);
   370→
   371→-- Create index on tenant_account_id for faster lookups
   372→CREATE INDEX idx_withdrawal_tenant_account_id ON withdrawal(tenant_account_id);
   373→
   374→
   375→-- Create index on currency_code for faster lookups
   376→CREATE INDEX idx_withdrawal_currency_code ON withdrawal(currency_code);
   377→
   378→-- Create composite index on status and created_at for common query patterns
   379→CREATE INDEX idx_withdrawal_status_created_at ON withdrawal(status, created_at);
   380→
   381→-- Create index on created_at for ordered queries
   382→CREATE INDEX idx_withdrawal_created_at ON withdrawal(created_at);
   383→
   384→-- Create trigger to automatically update updated_at on row update
   385→CREATE TRIGGER update_withdrawal_updated_at
   386→    BEFORE UPDATE ON withdrawal
   387→    FOR EACH ROW
   388→    EXECUTE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column();
   389→
   390→-- Create enum type for outbox event status
   391→CREATE TYPE outbox_event_status AS ENUM ('pending', 'published', 'processed', 'failed');
   392→
   393→-- Create outbox_event table for transactional outbox pattern
   394→CREATE TABLE outbox_event (
   395→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
   396→    event_type VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
   397→    payload TEXT NOT NULL,
   398→    attempts INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
   399→    status outbox_event_status NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
   400→    last_attempt_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
   401→    sent_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
   402→    processed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
   403→    error_message TEXT,
   404→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
   405→);
   406→
   407→-- Create index on status for faster lookups of pending events
   408→CREATE INDEX idx_outbox_event_status ON outbox_event(status) WHERE status = 'pending';
   409→
   410→-- Create index on created_at for ordered processing
   411→CREATE INDEX idx_outbox_event_created_at ON outbox_event(created_at);
   412→
   413→-- Create index on event_type for filtering by event type
   414→CREATE INDEX idx_outbox_event_event_type ON outbox_event(event_type);
   415→
   416→-- Create composite index on status and created_at for common query patterns
   417→CREATE INDEX idx_outbox_event_status_created_at ON outbox_event(status, created_at);
   418→
   419→-- Create inbox_event table for idempotency (deduplication)
   420→CREATE TABLE inbox_event (
   421→    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
   422→    event_type VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
   423→    inbox_key VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
   424→    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
   425→);
   426→
   427→-- Create index on inbox_key for faster lookups (already unique, but explicit index)
   428→CREATE INDEX idx_inbox_event_inbox_key ON inbox_event(inbox_key);
   429→
   430→-- Create index on event_type for filtering
   431→CREATE INDEX idx_inbox_event_event_type ON inbox_event(event_type);
   432→
   433→

content.content:
-- ============================================================================
-- Database Initialization Script
-- ============================================================================
-- This script creates all tables, indexes, functions, and triggers for the
-- crypto-billing application. All UUIDs use uuidv7() for time-ordered IDs.
-- ============================================================================

-- Create enum type for user role
CREATE TYPE user_role AS ENUM ('ADMIN', 'USER');

-- Create function to automatically update updated_at timestamp
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_updated_at_column()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
    NEW.updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP;
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ language 'plpgsql';

-- Create tenant table
CREATE TABLE tenant (
    id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
    domain VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Create users table
CREATE TABLE "user" (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
    email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
    password VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    phone VARCHAR(50),
    role user_role NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USER',
    is_active BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
    tenant_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT fk_user_tenant FOREIGN KEY (tenant_id) REFERENCES tenant(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Create index on tenant_id for faster lookups
CREATE INDEX idx_user_tenant_id ON "user"(tenant_id);

-- Create index on email for faster lookups (already unique, but explicit index)
CREATE INDEX idx_user_email ON "user"(email);

-- Create refreshToken table (using camelCase to match Kysely code)
CREATE TABLE "refresh_token" (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
    token VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    user_id UUID NOT NULL,
    expires_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    CONSTRAINT fk_refresh_token_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES "user"(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);

-- Create index on userId for faster lookups
CREATE INDEX idx_refresh_token_user_id ON "refresh_token"(user_id);

-- Create index on token for faster lookups
CREATE INDEX idx_refresh_token_token ON "refresh_token"(token);

-- Create index on expiresAt for cleanup queries
CREATE INDEX idx_refresh_token_expires_at ON "refresh_token"(expires_at);

-- Create enum type for network
CREATE TYPE network AS ENUM ('Tron', 'Ethereum', 'Solana');

-- Create currency table
CREATE TABLE currency (
    id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuidv7(),
    code VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
    network network NOT NULL,
    name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    decimal_places INTEGER NOT NULL,
    min_deposit_amount NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    min_withdrawal_amount NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    min_pool_account_balance NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
    threshold_pool_account_balance_to_sweep NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
    optimal_pool_account_balance NUMERIC NOT NULL DEFAULT 100,
    deposit_commission VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    withdrawal_commission VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
    contract_address VARCHAR(255),
    created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    UNIQUE (code, network)
);

INSERT INTO public.currency (id,code,network,name,decimal_places,contract_address,min_deposit_amount,min_withdrawal_amount,deposit_commission,withdrawal_commission, threshold_pool_account_balance_to_sweep, min_pool_account_balance, optimal_pool_account_balance) VALUES
	 ('019b419b-4837-7b8c-a7bf-a81db24b54ab','USDT','Tron','USDT',6,'TG3XXyExBkPp9nzdajDZsozEu4BkaSJozs',1,5,'1%','1%+1', 500, 0, 0),
	 ('019b41a0-80f8-7543-89ec-265d2d481ae3','USDT','Ethereum','USDT',6,'0x7169D38820dfd117C3FA1f22a697dBA58d90BA06',1,5,'1%','1%+1', 500, 0, 0),
     ('019b41a0-80f8-7543-89ec-265d2d481ae4','USDC','Ethereum','USDC',6,'0x1c7D4B196Cb0C7B01d743Fbc6116a902379C7238',1,5,'1%','1%+1', 500, 0, 0),
     ('019b41a0-80f8-7543-89ec-265d2d481ae5','ETH','Ethereum','ETH',18,NULL,0.001,0.002,'1%','1%+0.001', 0.02, 0.001, 0.01),
	 ('019bd3d9-4a8f-7dc9-9e5e-c9627bf32c92','TRX','Tron','TRX',6,NULL,1,20,'1%','1%+5', 2000, 200, 1000);


-- Create index on currency network for faster lookups
CREATE INDEX idx_currency_network ON currency(network);

-- Create index on currency code for faster lookups
CREATE INDEX idx_currency_code ON currency(code);
